attributes.description: Alerts when Oracle process utilisation exceeds 85%. Nearing the process limit causes ORA-00020.
attributes.name: [Oracle OTel] Process utilisation high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Oracle process utilisation high

### What fired
`processes.usage / processes.limit > 85%`.

### Why it matters
When Oracle hits its `processes` init limit, new connections fail with ORA-00020. Approaching the ceiling threatens availability.

### Triage
1. Inspect session / process count trend.

### Remediation
- Raise `processes` init parameter.
- Tune client-side pooling.

### Tuning
- 85% threshold.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
// Process usage and limit are in separate TSDB document groups; aggregate across time window
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.processes.usage),
        limit_val = MAX(oracledb.processes.limit)
        BY oracledb.instance.name, host.name
| WHERE limit_val > 0
// Utilisation threshold: 85% — approaching process limit causes ORA-00020 connection refusals
// Adjust threshold to tune sensitivity (e.g. 80 for earlier warning)
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(usage * 100.0 / limit_val, 1)
| WHERE utilisation_pct > 85
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
